message:
refactor(tools): extract DiffRenderState and diff rendering helpers

Major readability refactoring of the diff rendering logic:
- Extract diff_line_num_width() helper for line number width calculation
- Extract split_diff_lines() for line splitting with empty-line trimming
- Add is_change_tag() inline helper for cleaner tag matching
- Introduce DiffRenderState struct encapsulating output, line numbers,
  flags, and config with methods: ensure_line_break(), mark_first_change(),
  push_added_line(), push_removed_line(), push_context_line(), push_skip_marker()
- Extract render_changed_part() and render_equal_part() for cleaner
  control flow in generate_diff_string()

No behavioral changes — pure structural refactoring for maintainability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
